description: Official policy URLs monitored monthly for changes. If content hash changes, a compliance_review_queue alert is raised for human review.

sources.name: NDIS Code of Conduct
sources.notes: Core obligations updated December 2023 to add key personnel coverage and fair pricing prohibition (Rule 8).

sources.name: NDIS Practice Standards — Core Modules
sources.notes: Version 4, November 2021. Reform program underway 2024-2026 — monitor for new standards.

sources.name: NDIS Pricing Arrangements and Price Limits
sources.notes: Updated annually (typically July). Monitor for major revisions affecting content rules.

sources.name: NDIS Practice Standards Reform
sources.notes: Reform program underway 2024-2026. Monitor for new standards affecting registered providers.

sources.name: NDIS Commission Regulatory Priorities
sources.notes: Signals where Commission is focusing enforcement. Informs Rule Group 5 updates.

sources.name: NDIS Code of Conduct — Fraud
sources.notes: Fraud definitions and obligations. Source for Rule 5.4 (no implied special access to NDIA processes).
